examples.title: Algorithm: Expression Evaluator
examples.description: Evaluates the value of an expression using synthesized attributes
examples.code:
ALGORITHM EvaluateExpression
INPUT: expression
OUTPUT: evaluated value

BEGIN
 IF expression IS literal THEN
 RETURN literal value
 ELSE IF expression IS binary operation THEN
 leftValue = EvaluateExpression(left operand)
 rightValue = EvaluateExpression(right operand)
 RETURN ApplyBinaryOperation(leftValue, rightValue, operator)
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to evaluate an expression by recursively evaluating its operands and applying the binary operation.

examples.explanation: This Python function evaluates an expression represented as a nested tuple structure.
